pr.title: Add Combined Int6 + QAT + Sliding Window submission

output.summary: Combines Int6 quant with FP16 tied embeddings, late-stage STE QAT, sliding-window eval, and Muon-aware schedule tweaks for low-penalty quantized inference.
techniques: STE-based QAT in last 30% to minimize quant penalty
Batched sliding-window eval with overtone init and phase-transition resid_mix
Muon-decoupled weight decay plus cosine warmdown and momentum warmup
